MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-17-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF MAR-17-2003, DEFAULT PROVE-UP IN SCD 218 AT 09:00 AM ON MARCH 17, 2003 GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. JUDGE: OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE, CLERK: P. DIAS, REPORTER: PATRICIA DOWLING.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. DEFEMDAMTS BUSABA DECHANU AND PIMOLRATANA OSORIO SHALL TAKE NOTHING HEREIN AND ALL CLAIMS AND PURPORTED CLAIMS OF SAID DEFENDANTS TO INTERPLED FUNDS ARE DENIED, DISMISSED AND DEFENDANTS SHALL RECOVER NOTHING FORM THE PARTIES HEREIN ON ACCOUNT OF THE MATTERS STATED IN THE COMPLAINT. DEFT'S. SANDY YEE AND C.C. YU ARE AWARDED THE BALANCE OF INTERPLED FUNDS AFTER DISBURSEMENT OF FUNDS TO ROUSE AND BAHLERT FOR COST AND FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $7,028.30 WHICH FUNDS CONSIST OF $114,497,78. THE CLERK OF THE COURT SHALL DISBURSE THE SUM OF $114,497.78 TOGETHER WITH ALL ACCRUED INTEREST IF ANY TO SANDY YEE AND C.C. YU C/O ROBERT N. WEAVER, THEIR COUNSEL, FORTHWITH.

ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANTS YEE AND YU AND DIRECTING CLERK TO DISBURSE INTERPLED FUNDS. IT IS ORDERED THAT THE EX PARTE APPLICATION BE GRANTED AND THT JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED IN THE FORM AS ATTACHED TO EXHIBIT A.
$7,028.30 CT ORD DISB PD TO ROUSE & BAHLERT, CHK 1600-02332722, TAG 12894, OTSP03000488.
$118,331.81 CT ORD DISB PD TO SANDY YEE & C.C. YU, PRINCIPAL OF $114,497.78, GROSS INTEREST OF $3,869.03 LESS ADMINISTRATIVE FEE OF $ 35.00, CHK $ 1600-02335634, TAG 12894, OTSP03000494.
MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-24-2003 VACATED, PLAINTIFF'S CASE DISMISSED.
